character_dossiers.name: the doctor
character_dossiers.biography: Part of a group on an island, involved in decisions regarding mutineers and leaving the island.

character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member allowed significant liberty, attempting to ingratiate himself with others despite slights.

character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: A member of the group who harbors fear toward his former quartermaster and is involved in leaving supplies.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: A leader recovering from illness but still giving orders to the crew.

character_dossiers.name: Gray
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member who approved the decision to desert the mutineers.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: A group member who accompanied the doctor ashore and interacted with a naval captain.
